_comment: Object-level tuning diagnostic map (note Sec. 3-4). Each observable maps to the card knob that moves it and the public/anchor target to tune toward. The tuning lens (delphes_pipeline.tuning) measures the observable, compares it to the target, and prints the residual + this action. target_kind: 'curve' = digitised POG/anchor curve dropped into validation/references/data/<observable>.json; 'unity' = response should equal 1.0; 'peak' = mass-peak position vs the anchor (see targets.json). The Level-1 candle diagnostics (Z->tautau / ttbar, note Table 5) are a later extension.

btag_eff_b.target: CMS BTV UParT-2024 Medium b-efficiency vs (pT,eta) (CMS-DP-2024-066)
btag_eff_b.action: retune the b EfficiencyFormula {5} to the UParT-2024 Medium curve

btag_eff_c.action: retune the c EfficiencyFormula {4} at the Medium WP

btag_mistag_light.target: CMS BTV UParT-2024 Medium light mistag (~1%) (CMS-DP-2024-066)
btag_mistag_light.action: retune the light EfficiencyFormula {0} to ~1% at the Medium WP

tau_eff.target: DeepTau v2p5 Medium VSjet genuine-tau efficiency incl. 4-mode acceptance (JINST 17 P07023)
tau_eff.action: retune the genuine-tau EfficiencyFormula {15} to DeepTau v2p5 Medium (the single most consequential knob)

tau_mistag.target: DeepTau v2p5 Medium jet->tau_h misidentification (JINST 17 P07023)
tau_mistag.action: retune the jet->tau mistag EfficiencyFormula {0}; the stock per-parton 0.01 under-counts the per-jet rate in busy bbtautau

tau_energy_response.card_knob: tau-jet energy-scale correction vs (pT, decay multiplicity)
tau_energy_response.action: derive and apply the tau-jet response correction so reco/gen visible-tau pT -> 1.0 (shifts m_tautau)

bjet_energy_response.action: tune the b-jet response so reco/gen pT matches the anchor (no b-energy regression per the reference analysis)

mbb_peak.target: visible AK4 di-jet peak at the anchor (elliptical SR centres ~109-134 GeV)
mbb_peak.action: tune the b-jet response so the visible m_bb peak sits at the anchor position

met_resolution.target: CMS PUPPI pTmiss resolution vs sum E_T (JINST 14 P07004)
met_resolution.action: tune the pTmiss resolution to the PUPPI curve (drives m_tautau via the estimator; decision D1)

electron_eff.action: check vs EGM; the full chain is tracking x reco x isolation, so the effective barrel plateau is below the 0.95 ID number

muon_eff.action: check vs MUO; the full chain is tracking x reco x isolation, so the effective barrel plateau is below the 0.95 ID number
